messages.message: Normal dataset, will process all at once.
Using GPU for extracting SIFT features
Altitude data detected, enabling it for GPS alignment
Running dense reconstruction. This might take a while.
DEM resolution is (2061, 1712), max tile size is 4096, will split DEM generation into 1 tiles

running gdal_translate -co NUM_THREADS=12 -co TILED=YES -co BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER -co COMPRESS=DEFLATE --config GDAL_CACHEMAX 23.85% "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_meshing\tmp\merged.vrt" "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_meshing\tmp\tiles.tif"

running pdal translate -i "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_filterpoints\point_cloud.ply" -o "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_georeferencing\odm_georeferenced_model.laz" ferry transformation --filters.ferry.dimensions="views => UserData" --writers.las.compression="lazip" --filters.transformation.matrix="1 0 0 346311.0 0 1 0 5495667.0 0 0 1 0 0 0 0 1" --writers.las.offset_x=346311.0 --writers.las.offset_y=5495667.0 --writers.las.scale_x=0.001 --writers.las.scale_y=0.001 --writers.las.scale_z=0.001 --writers.las.offset_z=0 --writers.las.a_srs="+proj=utm +zone=34 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs +type=crs"
Calculating cropping area and generating bounds shapefile from point cloud

running gdal_translate -a_ullr 346261.300838 5495696.405224 346346.850838 5495593.455223 -co TILED=YES -co COMPRESS=DEFLATE -co PREDICTOR=2 -co BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER -co BLOCKXSIZE=512 -co BLOCKYSIZE=512 -co NUM_THREADS=12 -a_srs "+proj=utm +zone=34 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs +type=crs" --config GDAL_CACHEMAX 23.55% --config GDAL_TIFF_INTERNAL_MASK YES "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_orthophoto\odm_orthophoto_render.tif" "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_orthophoto\odm_orthophoto.tif" > "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_orthophoto\gdal_translate_log.txt"

running gdalwarp -cutline "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_georeferencing\odm_georeferenced_model.bounds.gpkg" -crop_to_cutline -co TILED=YES -co COMPRESS=DEFLATE -co PREDICTOR=2 -co BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER -co BLOCKXSIZE=512 -co BLOCKYSIZE=512 -co NUM_THREADS=12 -dstalpha "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_orthophoto\odm_orthophoto.original.tif" "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_orthophoto\odm_orthophoto.tif" --config GDAL_CACHEMAX 23.5%

running gdalwarp -cutline "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\odm_georeferencing\odm_georeferenced_model.bounds.gpkg" -crop_to_cutline -co TILED=YES -co COMPRESS=DEFLATE -co PREDICTOR=2 -co BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER -co BLOCKXSIZE=512 -co BLOCKYSIZE=512 -co NUM_THREADS=12  "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\opensfm\stats\overlap.original.tif" "D:\datasets\odm_mygla_dataset\opensfm\stats\overlap.tif" --config GDAL_CACHEMAX 23.55%
